Name: WaterDrivenInfrastructure
Author: Jared
Description: Adds water-powered sawmills, forges, grinding mills, ore sluices, fishponds, and mill race outlets. Build large-scale infrastructure near rivers using water wheels and mill races. Mill Race Outlets provide a steady source of unclean water at any outdoor location — craft a Mill Race, build the outlet anywhere outside, and draw water freely (freezes in winter). Requires AdvancedCopperTools. Tested with EA 0.63.
